mods.name: Supplementaries
mods.description: A large, highly configurable Vanilla+ mod adding 80+ functional and decorative blocks and items that feel at home in the base game.

mods.name: Amendments
mods.description: Small vanilla tweaks and touch-ups: directional signs, hanging pots, ceiling lanterns, carpeted stairs and more.

mods.name: Map Atlases
mods.description: Bundle your maps into a single atlas that auto-updates and stitches the world together as you explore.

mods.name: Universal Sawmill
mods.description: A sawmill block that turns any wood into its planks, stairs, slabs and other cuts, for every wood type in your pack.

mods.name: Polytone
mods.description: A powerful resource-pack driven colormap and tinting engine for blocks, items, fluids and particles.

mods.name: Snowy Spirit
mods.description: A festive winter mod: garlands, gift wrapping, ginger houses, sleds, hot cocoa and more holiday cheer.

mods.name: Haunted Harvest
mods.description: A spooky autumn mod stuffed with Halloween decorations, treats and trick-or-treating fun.

mods.name: Sleep Tight
mods.description: Makes beds matter: sleep buffs, bad-dream penalties, bed setting, and configurable sleep mechanics.

mods.name: Mystical Oak Tree
mods.description: A rare oak that grows enchanted fruit granting XP, effects and other little mystical rewards.

mods.name: Storage Labels
mods.description: Label your chests and barrels with the item inside so you can find things at a glance.

mods.name: Goated
mods.description: Overhauls goats into a fully-featured mob with new behaviors, drops and interactions.

mods.name: Moyai
mods.description: It adds a moai. That's it. That's the mod.

mods.name: JEED
mods.description: Just Enough Effect Descriptions: adds a JEI tab explaining exactly what every status effect does.

mods.name: Advancement Frames
mods.description: Gives every advancement toast a frame matching its type, so progress reads at a glance.

mods.name: Randomium
mods.description: A rare ore that drops a random item every time you mine it. What will you get?

mods.name: Heartstone
mods.description: Adds a heartstone that lets you set and teleport back to a home point.

mods.name: Better Lily Pads
mods.description: Lets you place lily pads on top of one another and adds a few nice lily-pad tweaks.

mods.name: Fast Paintings
mods.description: Place a painting instantly at the exact size you want, no more random rolls.

mods.name: MmmMmmMmmMmm
mods.description: Adds a target dummy you can whack to test your damage output.

mods.name: Vista
mods.description: Adds animated panorama backgrounds to your title screen based on your recent worlds.

mods.name: PackEditor
mods.description: An in-game editor for creating and tweaking resource and data packs on the fly.
